key_files.relevance: Contains get_default_resolution function with incorrect (larger) values that need to be updated to match CLI/TS defaults
SUPPORTED_RATIOS dict defines canonical smallest resolutions per ratio - source of truth
ASPECT_RATIO_RESOLUTIONS already uses first entry as default - no changes needed
Test get_default_resolution_returns_correct_values needs updated assertions to match new smaller defaults

patterns.name: First-entry-is-default
patterns.description: Both cli.py and config_controls.ts treat index 0 of their resolution lists as the default. launch_args.rs deviates by hardcoding larger values.

patterns.name: Rust unit tests for resolution defaults
patterns.description: Tests in launch_args.rs verify exact (width, height) pairs for each ratio

architecture.summary: Three components define defaults: Python CLI (SUPPORTED_RATIOS), TypeScript UI (ASPECT_RATIO_RESOLUTIONS), Rust launch_args (get_default_resolution). Only Rust is out of sync.
